hook.text: Two candidates apply for an HR director role. One has a PHR certification. The other doesn't. Who gets the edge?

buildup.text: HR certifications like PHR, SPHR, SHRM-CP, and SHRM-SCP validate knowledge and professional credibility.

discovery.text: They cover employment law, talent management, compensation, and strategic HR—tested through rigorous exams.

twist.text: Certification isn't required to work in HR, but it significantly boosts salary and career advancement.

climax.text: Certified professionals earn 15-20% more on average and are preferred for senior HR leadership roles.

punchline.text: Certification proves you know HR, not just do HR.

quiz.question: What do HR certifications like SHRM-CP validate?
